title: KP:1 signatures.yaml Schema
description: JSON Schema for the signatures.yaml integrity manifest in a KP:1 knowledge pack. Provides cryptographic hashes and optional signing for integrity verification.

algorithm.description: Hash algorithm used for all file digests.

signed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the hashes were computed and optionally signed.

additionalProperties.description: Hex-encoded content hash for the file.

files.description: Map of file paths (relative to pack root) to their hex-encoded content hashes. At minimum should include PACK.yaml and claims.md.

key_id.description: Optional key identifier for key management systems.

signing_key.description: Signing key reference. Required when a signature is present.

signature.description: Base64-encoded cryptographic signature over the canonical hash manifest.
